title: 3 Beaten-Down Growth Stocks With More Than 50% Upside Potential
text: The key to picking growth stocks right now is to look for companies whose earnings momentum and growth can withstand any market conditions. The post 3 Beaten-Down Growth Stocks With More Than 50% Upside Potential appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Here's Why You Should Hold on to ResMed (RMD) Stock for Now
text: Investors are optimistic about ResMed (RMD) on increased demand for sleep and respiratory care devices on steady recovery of markets from COVID-19 impacts.
